title: Reduce output on copy
body:
I have started to use skopeo 0.1.34 in gitlab CI to copy an image to a docker registry.
This works great, but there is one inconvinience: The logs get really long due to the progress updates getting added as new lines.
I did not find an option to reduce output. Having such option would be great.

comments.body:
Hi @baracoder, thanks a lot for your input. We faced a very similar issue and changed the containers/image library to only print the progress bars when the file descriptor points to a TTY. With the next release of skopeo, only one line per blob/config will be printed when, for instance, piping the output to a file.

Would that solve your issue?

Thank you @vrothberg, this sounds great. I am looking forward to the next release.
For reference: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/558
